etymology.description: иҫ¶(иҫө) (walk; movement) + еҶ“(еҶ“) (gГІu) = semantic 'to walk or meet' with phonetic reinforcement from еҶ“
etymology.interpretation: йҒҳ(йҒҳ) (gГІu, "to meet") combines иҫ¶(иҫө) (chuГІ, "walk; movement") signaling action or motion, with еҶ“(еҶ“) (gГІu), lending its sound. The character suggests 'coming across or meeting while moving'.
